en.title: Web Development in Amsterdam | Creative & Tech-Driven
en.description: Leading web development agency in Amsterdam. We combine creative design with robust technology to build websites that stand out.
en.h1: Tech-Driven Web Engineering for Amsterdam's Global Commerce Hub
en.p: AVPdev delivers high-performance Next.js platforms and intelligent automation for Amsterdam companies competing on the European and global stage.

benefits.title: Elite Web Performance for Amsterdam
benefits.desc: We build Astro and Next.js websites for Amsterdam's e-commerce and international trade, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores and top search rankings.

benefits.title: Intelligent Automation Bots
benefits.desc: Custom Telegram bots for Amsterdam businesses: lead capture, notifications, and 24/7 customer service on autopilot.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Amsterdam?
faq.a: Pricing starts from €250 for Astro landing pages and €300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from €750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from €50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
